steps.title: Map the logical relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1: resins play several important roles in maintaining tree health. Sentence 2: gives one specific role — sealing wounds to keep insects and fungi out.

steps.title: Pick the matching transition
steps.content:
The logical relationship is exemplification: sentence 2 is a specific instance of the general claim in sentence 1. The blank needs a transition signaling "here is one example."
  • Choice A — 'Regardless,': signals that what follows is true despite some obstacle; no obstacle is present here. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Next,': signals a sequence of separate steps; this is not a step-by-step procedure. ✗
  • Choice C — 'However,': signals contrast; sentence 2 does not contradict sentence 1. ✗
  • Choice D — 'For example,': signals an illustrative instance of a general claim; sentence 2 is exactly that. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
